recommendations.title: Cat and Dog

recommendations.title: Paris or Perish
recommendations.overview: Maya is living the ultimate fashionistas dream: she is working as a stylist for one of the French trend setters, in the capital of haute-couture: Paris.  One of the IT girls of fashion, shes following her dreams until one night, when her life takes a

recommendations.title: Sahara
recommendations.overview: A young cobra and his scorpion best friend go on a journey across the Sahara desert to save a new-found love.

recommendations.title: The Bride
recommendations.overview: Based on the famous play "Bodas de sangre" (Blood Wedding) by Federico García Lorca, La novia tells the story of a passionate love triangle. A bride leaves her groom, no longer able to withstand the surging desires of her lover, Leonordo.

recommendations.title: Loving Only You
recommendations.overview: Lukewarm wedding acquires a new meaning when the father of the groom rekindles his long-time love for the mother of the bride.

recommendations.title: OSS 117: Lost in Rio
recommendations.overview: In 1967, OSS 117 is sent to Brazil in order to retrieve a microfilm list of French Nazi sympathizers, only to once again unknowingly set foot into a bigger international intrigue.

recommendations.title: Brutus vs Cesar
recommendations.overview: Faced with the tyranny of Caesar who acts as absolute master over Rome, Senators Rufus and Cassius form a plot to assassinate him.

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: Imagine Me & You

recommendations.title: Love Tactics 2
recommendations.overview: Asli thinks marriage is a scam, and says so. But when her beau Kerem unexpectedly agrees, she goes to great lengths to manipulate him into proposing.
